title: Luffy’s Grief and the ASL Past
description: In the Post-War / ASL Flashback storyline, this section centers on Sabo, Dadan, Franky, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.

dialogue.text: I'm still hungry! I want some meat!!

dialogue.text: And don't grow anything without permission!!
